rationale: All 5 ACs satisfied. execute()/RowStream exposed, full parse‚Üívalidate‚Üíplan‚Üíexecute path tested, lazy iterator chains verified by CountingStore (LIMIT 2 pulls 2 of 100), 30s timeout enforced via injectable ExecutionClock with ManualClock test. Harness reports tests/clippy passed.

findings.summary: Expand operator buffers all per-input-row expansions into a Vec via BFS (expand_row returns Vec<Result<...>>). Non-materializing at the input level (flat_map streams across input rows) but eager per source row. Acceptable per AC3 wording (no full result set collected) and test coverage.
Timeout is checked between row pulls but not within a single operator's per-row work (e.g. Expand BFS, Sort materialization). Adequate for the AC4 wall-clock guarantee on streaming pulls.
IndexLookup with ordered_by silently materializes via materialize_sorted; documented behavior consistent with Sort being the only acknowledged materializing operator.
